home.title: Zouma Village Portal
home.description: A placeholder English experience for the Zouma Village Web/PWA.

booking.description: Review courtyard inventory, dates, guests, booking notices and pending payment confirmation.

feedback.description: Submit content, service, facility, payment or other feedback and create a trackable ticket.

trees.title: Zouma Tree Adoption

tickets.title: Zouma Tickets
tickets.description: Preview ticket and activity preorder products.

me.title: Zouma Member Center
me.description: Preview booking, adoption and ticket order placeholders.

privacy.title: Zouma Privacy Center
privacy.description: Preview consent and privacy management items.

products.title: Zouma Village Products | Offline confirmation order
products.description: Browse Zouma Village products, gifts, and village meal offers, then submit an offline confirmation order.

calendar.title: Zouma Farming Calendar
calendar.description: View Zouma Village farming activities by solar term and season.

hero.title: Adoption is a long-term relationship with a tree
hero.body: This phase shows adoptable trees, profiles, rights, agreement and growth records. Payment remains a reserved entry.

guardrail.locationBody: Precise GPS is not shown publicly.
guardrail.paymentBody: Only pending payment confirmation is shown in this phase.

list.title: Choose a documented lychee tree
list.body: Tree data is local and can later migrate to /api/v1/trees.

environment.title: Under-tree conditions
environment.description: Live LoRa readings are preferred. Seasonal climate baselines take over while sensors are offline or under maintenance.
environment.baselineNote: Seasonal climate baselines are shown until the live sensor connection returns.
environment.inactiveNote: The device is under maintenance, so baseline indicators are muted.

rights.title: Rights for this adoption
rights.description: Harvest, visits, a custom nameplate and delivery unlock with the adoption status.

harvestQuota.title: Minimum harvest
harvestQuota.body: Receive {quota} of harvest or equivalent farm produce this cycle.

onsiteBooking.title: On-site picking
onsiteBooking.body: Choose a priority picking slot during harvest season.

nameplate.title: Custom tree plate
nameplate.body: Add a personal name and message to your adopted tree.

coldChain.title: Cold-chain delivery
coldChain.body: Have the harvest packed and shipped when you cannot visit.

rights.lockedNote: All four rights become available after payment is completed.
rights.previewNote: Complete an adoption to unlock the rights included in your plan.

growth.title: A lychee's journey
growth.description: Swipe through flowering, fruiting, ripening and harvest to explore each stage.

flowering.label: Flowering
flowering.detail: Temperature, humidity and rainfall guide canopy ventilation and blossom protection.

fruiting.label: Fruiting
fruiting.body: Young fruit enters its stable phase.
fruiting.detail: Fruit density, branch load and soil moisture shape the next care actions.

ripening.label: Ripening
ripening.detail: Light, fruit color and weather are monitored while picking reservations are prepared.

harvest.label: Harvest
harvest.detail: Pick during a reserved visit or choose cold-chain delivery, with every destination recorded.

seasonal.label: Seasonal
seasonal.body: For first-time adoption with staged updates.

annual.label: Annual
annual.body: For long-term care records, activities and certificate.

agreement.title: Agreement
agreement.body: I understand the rights, update rhythm, harvest method and pending payment state.

messages.unavailable: This tree is not open for confirmation.
messages.submitFailed: Adoption submission failed. Please try again later.

order.title: Adoption created
order.body: The adoption order is pending payment.

lz018.name: Yunli 018
lz018.location: North lychee orchard area, precise coordinates hidden.
lz018.imageAlt: Yunli 018, a twelve-year-old Feizixiao lychee tree

lz026.summary: Good for family adoption and classes.
lz026.location: Central orchard area near class route.

lz041.name: Yunli 041
lz041.location: Southern old-tree area, coordinates internal only.
lz041.imageAlt: Yunli 041, a twenty-three-year-old lychee tree under observation

shipment.title: Pick and ship
shipment.body: Submit a picking time and delivery address from the tree profile. Public logistics details are masked.
shipment.success: Shipment request created. The team will confirm picking and logistics.
shipment.failed: Submission failed. Please check the form and try again.
shipment.destinationNote: Visitor chose pick-and-ship from the tree profile.

hero.title: Preorder placeholders for tickets and activities
hero.body: This phase shows product structure before real payment and verification are connected.

notice.title: Preorder note
notice.body: No real ticket code is generated yet.

ancientRoad.name: Audio guide pass
ancientRoad.summary: Guide device and tea break placeholder.

lycheeClass.name: Family lychee class
lycheeClass.summary: Tree profile, picking knowledge and processing activity.

resilienceWorkshop.name: Rainwater workshop
resilienceWorkshop.summary: Water safety and ecological restoration course.

list.title: Choose a ticket or activity
list.body: These are product placeholders before real inventory and ticket codes are connected.

order.title: Preorder created
order.body: The ticket preorder is now pending payment. Payment is not connected yet.

messages.submitFailed: Preorder submission failed. Please try again.

hero.title: Order list placeholder
hero.body: Bookings, tree adoption and ticket orders are grouped here.

hero.title: Consent placeholders
hero.body: Privacy policy, data collection and AI processing consent are reserved here.

policy.title: Privacy policy
policy.body: Shows policy version and confirmation status.

data.title: Data collection
data.body: Explains trip, booking and feedback data scope.

ai.title: AI processing
ai.body: AI inputs must be sanitized first.

hero.title: Cloud Veins, Lychee Waters, Zouma
hero.subtitle: A lightweight village portal connecting stories, routes, courtyards, tree adoption and repeat visits.
hero.videoAlt: Aerial view of the Longxi River, mountain ridges and Zouma Village

history.title: Four chapters along one mountain ridge
history.description: A source-reviewed village narrative, from regional gazetteers and a physical road marker to today's Four Realms plan.

tang.title: Tang-era Lewen County: a regional horizon
tang.body: The Changshou District Gazetteer records the establishment of Lewen County in the Tang era, providing a time marker for the wider region. It is presented here as regional context, without equating an ancient county boundary or seat with present-day Zouma Village.
tang.source: Basis: administrative-history entries in the Changshou District Gazetteer; reviewed as regional history.

lychee.title: The lychee road: clues from Feiziyuan
lychee.body: The Fuzhou Gazetteer preserves a Tianbao-era reference to Feiziyuan, offering evidence of the historical relationship between lychee cultivation and mountain travel in the Changshou area. The Zouma ridge story connects orchard, road and seasonal journeys without inventing an exact route.
lychee.source: Basis: the Tianbao-era Feiziyuan entry in the Fuzhou Gazetteer; documentary clues are not presented as a proven route.

milestone.title: 1897: a stone guidepost
milestone.body: A guidepost dated to the twenty-third year of the Guangxu reign and unearthed on Zouma ridge is tangible evidence of historic movement. It brings the broad chronology of gazetteers down to the everyday scale of villagers and travelers finding their way.
milestone.source: Basis: the Guangxu 23 guidepost unearthed on Zouma ridge; future interpretation follows verified artifact records.

modern.title: Zouma today: Four Realms growing together
modern.body: Zouma Village in Fengcheng Subdistrict, Changshou District now organizes its rural experience through the Ancient Road, Lychee Field, Resilience Valley and Ridge Dwelling realms. This village is not Zouma Ancient Town in Jiulongpo District; they are separate places.
modern.source: Basis: the contemporary Four Realms plan; location verified as Zouma Village, Fengcheng Subdistrict, Changshou District, Chongqing.

audio.tang: Listen to the Lewen County chapter
audio.lychee: Listen to the lychee road chapter
audio.modern: Listen to the Four Realms chapter

weather.summary: Weather integration is reserved for a later step.
weather.configureHint: Configure QWEATHER_API_KEY to switch to live weather automatically

courtyard.title: Courtyard preview
courtyard.body: Inventory will be connected in a later step.

tree.title: Tree adoption
tree.body: A yearly relationship built around tree records.

guardrails.title: Light platform first
guardrails.body: The first screen organizes real resources without overbuilding.

realms.title: Four operational rural experiences
realms.description: Each realm connects content, route, booking or adoption.

ancientRoad.title: Ancient Road
ancientRoad.summary: A walking story line for road heritage and local memory.

lycheeField.title: Lychee Field
lycheeField.summary: From one tree to one table.

ridgeDwelling.title: Ridge Dwelling
ridgeDwelling.summary: Courtyards for stays, workshops and shared life.

mapGateway.title: Choose a direction to explore
mapGateway.description: Enter four rural experiences through the map. Select a realm polygon or its accessible link to continue to scenes, routes, bookings and adoption.
mapGateway.mapAria: Interactive map of Zouma Village's Four Realms
mapGateway.anchorHint: Guidepost, ancient tree and herbal courtyard

booking.title: Courtyard booking starts with a clear stay entry
booking.body: Calendar and inventory will be added later.
booking.status: Booking flow opens in a later step

adoption.title: Tree adoption needs ceremony and trust
adoption.body: A long-term relationship around tree files and care logs.
adoption.imageAlt: Adoptable lychee trees in Zouma Village orchard
adoption.ctaHint: Go directly to available trees, profiles, rights and growth records.

1.title: Tree file
1.body: Species, age, health and blurred location.

hero.title: Make availability, stay rules and pending payment clear
hero.body: This phase uses local structured inventory and does not connect real payment. Visitors can choose courtyard, date, guests and payment mode, then create a pending-payment confirmation.

guardrail.title: Payment entry pending
guardrail.body: The page only shows booking confirmation and pending payment. Real payment must later use a unified payment order, idempotency key and sandbox mode.

list.title: Choose a courtyard for this booking
list.body: Courtyards are organized as ridge stay, lychee food class and ancient road station resources before moving to /api/v1/courtyards.

form.title: Confirm date, guests and payment mode

messages.capacityExceeded: The guest count exceeds this courtyard capacity. Reduce guests or choose a larger courtyard.
messages.submitFailed: Booking submission failed. Please try again later.

order.title: Booking created
order.body: The order is now pending payment. The payment entry is not connected yet, so no real charge occurs.

ridgeShared.name: Ridge Shared Courtyard
ridgeShared.summary: A stay and co-creation courtyard for small teams, connected to village meals, morning farm activity and ridge walks.
ridgeShared.location: Ridge Dwelling Realm · Near Chengjiawan and Tujiawan
ridgeShared.notice: Confirm arrival one day ahead. Overnight stays require valid ID, with parking followed by shuttle or short walk.

lycheeFood.name: Lychee Shared Courtyard
lycheeFood.summary: For family food education groups, picking, class prep, village meals and short stays.
lycheeFood.location: Lychee Field Realm · Near lychee and longan orchards
lycheeFood.notice: Food class materials should be confirmed ahead. Rain keeps indoor class and cancels muddy picking.
lycheeFood.imageAlt: Lychee shared courtyard and stone house

ancientStation.name: Ancient Road Station Courtyard
ancientStation.summary: Supports light ancient road walks, audio guides and tea breaks. It is currently under preparation.
ancientStation.location: Ancient Road Realm · Near Zouma Ridge road node
ancientStation.notice: This courtyard is under maintenance and cannot be confirmed yet. Please choose another courtyard.

hero.title: Turn field feedback into trackable operation tickets
hero.body: This phase opens the visitor feedback entry with category, severity, rating and written notes. A ticket id is created after submission and appears in the admin feedback list.

guardrail.title: Feedback is sanitized first
guardrail.body: Phone numbers and precise coordinates are masked before entering the ticket flow. Future AI summaries must also pass sanitization and the backend model adapter.

form.title: Tell us what needs follow-up
form.body: Describe the location, time and issue as clearly as possible. The system creates a pending ticket and does not publish your feedback.
form.contentPlaceholder: Example: The sign from the visitor center to Taojiawan parking point is not clear enough.

messages.submitFailed: Feedback could not be submitted. Please try again later.

result.title: Submission result
result.body: After success, the ticket id and current status are shown here. Admin can update handling records.
result.empty: Submit the form to create a trackable ticket.

hero.title: Generate explainable routes by duration, audience and weather
hero.body: The first version uses rule-based templates and does not call AI or map APIs.

form.title: Tell the system how to walk
form.body: Use the provided planning scope and satellite map to produce an MVP route card.
form.ruleBody: The frontend sends duration, audience and weather tags to /api/v1/routes/generate. The backend calls ModelProviderAdapter when a key is configured.

result.providerFallback: AI service is not configured. Showing local route recommendation.

gentleAncientRoad.title: Senior-friendly ancient road light route
gentleAncientRoad.summary: A gentle route through visitor center, Taojiawan, ancient road story and waterfront rest.
gentleAncientRoad.rainFallback: Shorten the ancient road section and move to indoor story and courtyard tea.
gentleAncientRoad.notice: Avoid noon and prefer nearby parking.

familyLycheeClass.title: Family lychee food route
familyLycheeClass.summary: Orchard, food classroom and adoption entry with reduced climbing.
familyLycheeClass.rainFallback: Keep food class and tree profile, cancel muddy picking.
familyLycheeClass.notice: Reserve food class and keep children away from waterfront edges.

regularFourRealms.title: One-day four-realms route
regularFourRealms.summary: A full first-visit route connecting ancient road, orchard, water and ridge courtyard.
regularFourRealms.rainFallback: Switch to short road, food class, workshop and courtyard stay.

rainStudyRoute.title: Rainy resilience study route
rainStudyRoute.summary: A lower-risk indoor and workshop route for rainy days.
rainStudyRoute.rainFallback: If warning is active, keep only visitor center and indoor workshop.

hotLowRiskRoute.title: Hot-weather low-risk route
hotLowRiskRoute.summary: Shade, courtyard and waterfront rest with reduced exposed walking.
hotLowRiskRoute.rainFallback: Move to courtyard tea and indoor narration after showers.
hotLowRiskRoute.notice: Travel in morning or evening and prioritize hydration.

twoDayCourtyard.title: Two-day ridge courtyard route
twoDayCourtyard.summary: Four realms and village meal on day one, morning farm and workshop on day two.
twoDayCourtyard.rainFallback: Keep courtyard, meal, workshop and indoor classes.
twoDayCourtyard.notice: Reserve stay, meal and study quota.

narrativeSixStops.title: Six-stop Narrative Route
narrativeSixStops.summary: A six-stop route connecting the ancient road, lychee fields, waterside rest, ridge courtyards, and resilience workshop.
narrativeSixStops.rainFallback: On rainy days, shorten the waterside stop and move more time into indoor workshops and courtyard tea.
narrativeSixStops.notice: Reserve lunch and workshop capacity ahead of time.

detail.ruleBody: This page uses prepared project material only. Later AI narration must include source, update time and confidence.
detail.nextBody: The realm pages first provide structured content and action entries. Routes, booking, adoption and feedback will be connected later.

ancientRoad.eyebrow: Ancient road, relay station and longevity culture
ancientRoad.title: Ancient Road Realm
ancientRoad.summary: A walkable and narratable heritage route based on Zouma Ridge road memory.

story.title: Make history walkable
story.body: Organize road, station, signpost, spring and local memory into a clear visitor sequence.

experience.title: Beyond static panels
experience.body: Future steps connect audio guides, AI summaries, study cards and booking nodes.

operation.title: Low-intervention first
operation.body: Protect boundaries, repair lightly and keep village life present.

lycheeField.title: Lychee Field Realm
lycheeField.summary: Turn lychee from a single crop into adoption, picking, processing, food education and repeat visits.

tree.title: A long-term tree relationship
tree.body: Future adoption pages show tree profile, health, blurred location, care logs and certificate rights.

table.title: From tree to table
table.body: Picking, processing, drinks, gifts, meals and family courses form a complete experience chain.

trust.title: Rights must be clear
trust.body: Events, harvest pickup, delivery feedback and care update frequency should be explicit.

resilienceValley.eyebrow: Longxi water, rain flood and study
resilienceValley.title: Resilience Valley Realm
resilienceValley.summary: Turn water management into a resilient corridor, waterfront experience and nature classroom.

system.label: Roof, yard, terrace, pond, wetland and riverbank

water.title: Ecology as foundation
water.body: Rain gardens, ecological ditches, pond purification and wetland buffers form a maintainable water system.

learning.title: Governance becomes courseware
learning.body: Water level, quality, flood paths and hydropower memory can become study content.

weather.title: Routes respond to weather
weather.body: Later route generation will reduce risk for rain, heat and warnings.

ridgeDwelling.eyebrow: Ridge courtyards, stays and shared life
ridgeDwelling.title: Ridge Dwelling Realm
ridgeDwelling.summary: Reuse courtyards for village life, visitor stays, youth creation and low-carbon operations.

renovation.title: Low-intervention retrofit
renovation.body: Keep roofs, stone bases, courtyards and terraces while improving safety and comfort.

life.title: Courtyards are not backdrops
life.body: Stays, workshops, shared kitchens and product display should support real life.

operation.title: From bookable to revisitable
operation.body: Future booking adds calendar inventory, notices, order confirmation and payment entry.

hero.title: Turn village products into browseable and revisitable orders
hero.body: Payments are not connected yet. Visitors can choose a product, leave contact details, and create an offline confirmation order.

list.title: Choose a product or meal service
list.body: Products come from the admin Product table and can be linked to consumption nodes. Empty prices appear as negotiable.

notice.title: Notice
notice.body: This order is pending offline confirmation and will not charge payment. Operators can continue processing it in admin orders.

order.title: Order created
order.body: The product order is pending offline confirmation.

messages.contactRequired: Please fill contact name and phone

hero.title: Follow Zouma Village through the seasonal farming calendar
hero.body: View pruning, fertilizing, harvest, processing and seasonal events on one clear timeline.

messages.empty: No farming calendar items match the filters

login.title: Villager sign in
login.body: Use your registered phone number to access tasks and earnings.
login.requestError: No active villager matches this phone
login.verifyError: The code is invalid or expired

earnings.title: My earnings
earnings.empty: Earnings will appear after tasks are completed

touristNotifications.title: Notification center
touristNotifications.body: See the latest tree and activity updates.
touristNotifications.noIdentity: Leave your phone number during adoption, booking, or ticket purchase to receive updates.

interactions.title: My interactions
interactions.body: Complete orchard activities and keep your care record.
interactions.shareText: I adopted tree {treeCode} in Zouma Village. Follow its growth with me.

login.title: Villager sign in | Zouma Village
login.description: Sign in to the villager portal
